---
title: Machine Learning Fundamentals - Learn through coding
---

### Contents
- [Python setup](chapters/00-setup.ipynb)
- [Regression](chapters/01-regression.ipynb)
- [Vectors and Similarity](chapters/02-vectors.ipynb)
- [Classification with the Perceptron Algorithm](chapters/03-classification.ipynb)
- [Classification with the Perceptron Algorithm - Part 2](chapters/04-classification-02.ipynb)


© 2026 Patrick Lowry | [GitHub](link) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick-lowry/)
